title: Shipfix - Global Market Update
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
The past week saw the BDI extending on recent gains, with a strong performance for the Panamaxes more than offsetting losses in the other segments. Likewise, the commodities also experienced a week of mixed fortunes. The agricultural commodities and iron ore faced significant headwinds, while supply concerns contributed to gains for many energy commodities.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
By Ulf Bergman
The past week saw the BDI extending on recent gains, with a strong performance for the Panamaxes more than offsetting losses in the other segments. Likewise, the commodities also experienced a week of mixed fortunes.

children.title: Macro/Geopolitics
children.summary: The US dollar came under pressure on Friday, with the greenback declining by around half a per cent against a basket of foreign currencies. Weaker-than-expected labour market data contributed to increasing signs that the world's largest economy is slowing down and weighed on the US currency.

children.title: Commodity Markets
children.summary: Crude oil prices advanced last week as concerns over global supplies mounted amid reports that Saudi Arabia is extending its unilateral output reduction. The September Brent futures recorded a weekly gain of 2.2 per cent and ended Friday's session at 86.24 dollars per tonne.

children.title: Freight and Bunker Markets
children.summary: Spot freight rates for the different dry bulk segments developed along diverging paths last week. A strong showing for the Panamaxes offset losses in the other segments, and the Baltic Dry Index advanced by 2.3 per cent over the past week.

children.title: The View from the Shipfix Desk
section_path: The View from the Shipfix Desk
children.section_path_text: The View from the Shipfix Desk
children.summary: The Baltic Exchange's freight rate indicator for the Supramaxes has almost halved since its high for the year in late March. After staging a minor recovery amid higher demand during the first two weeks of July, the segment's index declined during the past fortnight.
